title: orobanche californica subsp. grayana
intro: Orobanche californica subsp. grayana, also known as California broomrape, is a parasitic plant species belonging to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Orobanche californica subsp. grayana include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
